Chat Edit: 'Fix lexer runtime crash → get one successful end-to-end compilation
Add .data section support + extern declarations
Implement expression evaluation and complex addressing
Add control flow (call/jmp with label resolution)
Complete instruction set coverage
Self-compile and validate binary-identical output

fully reverse engineer each step remaining'

Chat Edit: 'Fix entry point RVA calculation
Add stack frame setup to entry point code
Add proper return instruction (RET for main exit)
Replace NOP-only codegen with real mnemonic matching
Add .data section support
Add extern/import support for self-hosting
This validates that the architectural approach works and opens the path to full self-hosting.'
